steps.title: Focus on similarity
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize what EPDM rubber and single-ply NiTi wire fibers have in common. The notes say both samples increased in surface temperature when twisted.

steps.title: Reject other focuses
steps.content: B emphasizes the difference in temperature increase, C inaccurately mentions two research teams, and D explains torsional heating without comparing the two named materials. The sentence should state their shared response. The answer is A.
